summary: Capital Goods, Pharma, and Automobiles showing volume-backed technical breakouts as Nifty stabilises above 23,800 on easing macro headwinds.
market_context: Nifty 50 has rebounded from April lows toward the 24,000 zone, supported by the RBI's 25bps rate cut and easing West Asia tensions. Nifty Midcap 100 surged 2.31% on April 15 and is up ~7% MTD, with Capital Goods, Pharma, and select Auto stocks leading the RRG rotation into the 'Improving' quadrant. FII net selling has moderated relative to March 2026, creating an environment where volume-confirmed breakouts in quality midcaps are offering high-probability 2-week momentum trades.

stocks.name: Laurus Labs Ltd
stocks.thesis: Decisive symmetrical triangle breakout above ₹1,075 on volume expansion — riding India's 12.4% YoY pharma market growth into April 30 Q4 results.

technical.trend: Bullish — reclaimed 50-DMA, trending above short-term MAs
points: Broke above symmetrical triangle at ₹1,075 on above-average volume
RSI at 60 rising from neutral — momentum inflecting, room before overbought
Bollinger Band width expanding confirms volatility breakout underway

fundamental.catalyst: India pharma IPM grew 12.4% YoY in Feb 2026 (third consecutive double-digit month); Q4 FY26 results due April 30
points: Domestic pharma IPM expanding 12%+ YoY for three straight months
CDMO segment gaining traction; multi-year API capacity expansion on track
Analyst consensus positive ahead of Q4 FY26 earnings on April 30

stocks.risk: Q4 FY26 miss on April 30 could reverse move sharply. Key support ₹1,040 — breach signals failed breakout.

stocks.name: Cummins India Ltd
stocks.thesis: Broke out of a short-term falling channel at ₹4,720 with a strong bullish candle, then retested and held above ₹4,550 — confirming supply absorption ahead of India's power-infra capex cycle.

technical.pattern: Falling Channel Breakout with Successful Retest
technical.trend: Bullish — RSI holding above 60 on both daily and weekly charts
points: Broke short-term falling channel at ₹4,720 on a strong bullish candle
Successful retest above ₹4,550 — prior breakout zone now acting as support
RSI sustaining above 60 on daily and weekly — institutional buying confirmed

fundamental.catalyst: India's power-sector and data-centre capex boom driving diesel genset and backup-power demand; ROE 24.5%, ROCE 30.2%, debt-free balance sheet
points: Power sector capex and data-centre construction driving genset order inflows
Debt-free; ROE 24.5% and ROCE 30.2% — premium valuation well supported
FY26 annual results due May 27 — strong execution expected

stocks.risk: Break below ₹4,620 (retest support) invalidates breakout; any capex-slowdown commentary at May 27 results is a tail risk.

stocks.name: Bajaj Auto Ltd
stocks.thesis: Ascending triangle at ₹8,800 resistance breaking with sustained volume as Mar'26 wholesale volumes sealed a strong FY26 close and Q4 earnings approach.

technical.trend: Bullish — reclaimed 20-DMA; MACD bullish crossover on daily
points: Breaking above ₹8,800 horizontal resistance after series of higher lows
RSI at 60 — entering momentum zone above 50-DMA with positive slope
MACD bullish crossover on daily chart; signal line turning upward

fundamental.catalyst: FY26 closed with sustained momentum in Mar'26 wholesale volumes; Axis Direct named Bajaj Auto a top Buy in Q3FY26 update with 14%+ upside
points: Mar'26 wholesale volumes showed sustained momentum across all segments
Export recovery underway in Africa and LATAM — key growth driver for FY27
Chetak EV gaining market share; Pulsar EV lineup expanding in FY27

stocks.risk: Weak Q4 FY26 export data or guidance miss in late-April results. Below ₹8,200 signals failed ascending triangle — exit.
